items.name: MARCHÉE - Urban Grunge Boxy Knit Sweater
items.description:
MARCHÉE - Urban Grunge Boxy Knit Sweater [⚠️ OLD ITEM]
──────────────────────────────────────────
An avant-garde digital fashion label built on Roblox. Born at the intersection of virtual elegance and modern rebellion, MARCHÉE redefines what fashion means in a world where pixels are the new fabric.

**DISCLAIMER: Due to the wide variety of avatar bodies, complex poses, and the baggy silhouettes of our designs, slight visual glitches or artifacts may occur. This product uses an older model and utilizes an older rigging method, which may cause issues and inconsistencies depending on your avatar’s body setup. Please try before purchase.

items.name: Angel Wings
items.description:
Radiant, regal, and unmistakably classic — the Empyrean Reignment brings back that legendary old-school Roblox prestige. Its glowing white wings and golden crown spikes capture the spirit of the golden era, when avatars stood out with style, creativity, and pure nostalgia. Perfect for retro outfits, classic roleplay, and collectors who cherish true vintage Roblox history.

🪽 More Wings:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=wings&Category=1&CreatorName=classic+limiteds&salesTypeFilter=1

✅ Join the Group:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/12034553/Classic-Limiteds#!/about

🏛️ Classic Limiteds

items.name: Midnight Motor Madness Scooter
items.description: It's a party on a bike...that delivers tacos! Ride around using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or the arrow keys. Hit 'X' to toggle the headlight and 'H' to honk. Click with your mouse to grab a taco from the crate on the back of the vehicle and eat it.
